metadata.name: Centered #3
metadata.description:
Various animated patterns were moving, flickering, pulsating, and directed to the center of the screen.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Proport #10
metadata.description:
The title of this piece was a diminution state of the possible words between proportion and disproportion.

Inspired by the contradiction of reality and expectation, this piece was an experiment on the possible in-between situation where both "proportion" and "disproportion" that could be presented.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 2-second & 60 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIF file.
______________________________________________________________

Feel free to enjoy the animation.

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Miasmic #3
metadata.description:
The visual representation shows the animated movement of some dark-saturated colors and texture, which might give the sense of an eerie or another surreal atmosphere. An imaginary toxic landscape engulfed in darkness within the digital realm.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Unstable Space #30
metadata.description:
The piece interprets the imaginary senses of an unstable space, where various disruptions might happen within its existence.

Inspired by the human tendency to need a private safe space but instead always faces a contradiction with reality. All are accumulated and abstracted into moving visual representations.
______________________________________________________________

///INTERACTIVITY///
Read the instructions below and do it after opening the live mode.

1. Press the "c" button on your computer keyboard to save a frame from your minted iteration.

2. To save a 3-second & 30 fps .GIF file, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. The animated visual will always behave following the screen's resolution (e.g. the visual on 1:1 view and the live mode will show differently, but still give the same impression of the minted iteration). To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIFs file.
______________________________________________________________

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2023
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Multicolored Pixelated Field #22
metadata.description:
"The pixelated field radiates multicolored textures while relentlessly changing motions. A fantasy, imagination, and a place where ever-changing dream might reside within."

/////INTERACTIVITY/////
Do all the instructions below after opening the live mode.

1. To capture the screen, press the "c" button on your computer keyboard.

2. To save a 5-second .GIF from your iteration, press the "s" button on your computer keyboard. Please be patient while waiting for the piece to save and render its frames.

3. To adjust the piece resolution, you need to set your browser first and then reload the browser every time you want to capture the screen or save the rendered .GIF file.
///////////////////////

Created using Hydra and p5.js

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Entangled Clouds #4
metadata.description:
"The clouds lose their clarity, simplified imaginatively as impressions. Forming lines and moiré, accumulated and entangled."

metadata.name: Ecstatic Warp #6
metadata.description:
Interpreting the thought of the transcended trip that brings one's mind into another realm of saturated stimuli.

Take your time to enjoy the animation in live mode.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022

metadata.name: The Imaginary River Of Thoughts #53
metadata.description:
This work was inspired by the analogy of the mind that is similar to a river. Where all thoughts flow endlessly following the current within an imaginary landscape.

The visual representation of this work came from a personal reflection on human perspectives in measuring a decision within their everyday lives.

Press ’s’ on the live mode to save the screen capture.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Abstract Activities #5 #5
metadata.description:
The fifth and the last piece of the generative art series titled "Abstract Activities" explores any possible interpretation that relates to human reality.

This fifth piece interprets channeling focus activities within the human mind.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji
